# AgentIQ Neural OS

AgentIQ is a multi-agent AI voice platform that lets users create, configure, and deploy custom voice assistants powered by their own LLM API keys (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude). Features include real-time voice conversations via WebSocket, knowledge-base-backed agents, webhook integrations, and usage analytics.

## Key pages

- [Login](/login) — Sign in to your account
- [Register](/register) — Create a new account
- [Voice Lab](/) — Build and test voice agents
